title: Pigeon Post
content:
White wing, white wing,
    Lily of the air,
    What word dost bring,
    On whose errand fare?

    Red word, red word,
    Snowy plumes abhor.
    I, Christ's own bird,
    Do the work of war.
meaning:
Katharine Lee Bates's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Pigeon Post"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
